# {{SITE_NAME}} — CAIA Tier-5 Site Template

A Next.js 14 app-router scaffold for CAIA-ecosystem sites.

**Generated by:** `caia new site {{SITE_NAME}} --domain {{DOMAIN}}`

## Setup

1. Configure your domain in `next.config.ts`
2. Set environment variables in `.env.local`
3. Deploy to Cloudflare Pages

## Stack

- Next.js 14 (app router)
- TypeScript (strict)
- Tailwind CSS
- Cloudflare Pages deploy
